objective: Observable swarm + MCP behavior with human-gated auto-fixes.
steps: Define OTel resource attributes + span names in ``.ass-ade/aso/telemetry_metrics.schema.json``.
Export counters/histograms for MCP ``tools/call`` latency and token estimates where instrumented.

defer: AgentOps / Phoenix dashboards — wire after collector is running in CI or local compose.
